faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Kearny, NJ?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Kearny typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the infestation size, number of colonies, and treatment area. Minor infestations in single-family homes start around $350, while severe multi-colony infestations requiring extensive treatment and follow-up visits can reach $2,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Kearny home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include piles of sawdust-like wood shavings near baseboards or wooden structures, rustling sounds inside walls, and sightings of large black ants especially during spring evenings. You may also notice winged ants (swarmers) near windows or doors, indicating an established colony. Our Kearny technicians can perform thorough inspections to confirm carpenter ant activity and locate nests.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ants common in Kearny, New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants are very common in Kearny due to the area's humidity, older housing stock, and proximity to the Passaic River and surrounding wetlands. They're particularly active from spring through fall and are attracted to moisture-damaged wood in basements, attics, and around windows. Kearny's many multi-family homes and vintage properties provide ideal nesting conditions for these destructive pests.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat carpenter ants in Kearny?
faqs.answer: Best Pest Control NYC offers same-day and next-day service for Kearny residents in most cases. Initial treatments typically take 1-3 hours depending on property size and infestation severity. Most customers see significant reduction in carpenter ant activity within 48-72 hours, with complete elimination achieved through our follow-up treatment plan, usually within 2-4 weeks.
